name: MinigotchiV3
description: Pwnagotchi-style ESP32 firmware — passively rides nearby WiFi to collect handshakes / pwn networks. Requires a DUAL-CORE ESP32 (single-core ESP32 / ESP8266 are NOT supported).
note: ESP32 (dual-core) build, NOT the ESP8266 dj1ch/minigotchi. The old dj1ch/minigotchi-V3 repo was renamed to dj1ch/minigotchi-ESP32 (the V3 path now 404s) — corrected here. Upstream releases ship a source .zip (build via Arduino/PlatformIO), so there is usually no prebuilt .bin asset; on_error=source_only_empty makes the flasher degrade gracefully (no crash) until a flashable release exists or you supply a local .bin.
label: MinigotchiV3 (dj1ch)
